assistant.title: Smart Assistant
assistant.greeting: Ask me anything about the app and I'll point you to the steps.
assistant.noAnswer: I couldn't find a clear answer. Try rewording it or using simpler words.
assistant.supportSoon: Support chat and complaints are coming soon.
assistant.aiError: Couldn't reach the smart assistant right now. Try again later.
assistant.supportNotConfigured: Support is not enabled on this device yet.
assistant.supportEmpty: Start a conversation with support — send a complaint, suggestion, or question.

dev.notConfigured: Support service is not configured on this device.
dev.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this announcement?

sandbox.emptyInvoice: Add items to the invoice from search

installments.needCustomer: Select a customer to set up installments
license.title: Activate Software
license.subtitle.locked: This PC is not activated. Send the machine code below to the seller to unlock the app on this device.
license.subtitle.expired: This device's license has expired. Send the machine code to the seller to renew.
license.instructions: Send this code to the seller via WhatsApp or phone. They will send back a license.key file (USB is easiest) or a shorter activation code.
license.filePreferred: No internet needed: copy license.key to a USB stick, then choose the file below.
license.orDrop: or drag & drop the file here
license.success.title: Activated successfully
license.error.wrong_machine: This license belongs to another device and will not work on this PC.
license.error.clock_rollback: A change in the system clock was detected. Please set the correct date and time.
license.error.invalid: Invalid activation code. Make sure you copied all of it.
license.error.hardware: Could not read the machine ID. Restart the app; if the problem persists, contact the seller.
license.error.file: Could not read the selected file.
license.error.empty: Please enter an activation code or choose a file.
license.error.generic: Activation failed. Try again or contact the seller.
app.title: ElHegazi Retailer
reports_subtitle: Select a report, then choose the appropriate run mode.
reports_select_hint: Select a report to see control actions.
reports_invalid_range: Start date must be before or equal to end date.
reports_live_data: This report uses live data and does not require a date range.
r01_desc: Daily sales with costs, profits, and returns totals.
r02_desc: All invoices with customer, cashier, and item count.
r03_desc: Best-selling items by quantity, revenue, and margin.
r04_desc: Sales distribution across categories with profits.
r05_desc: User performance by sales, invoice count, and returns.
r06_desc: Invoices grouped by payment method with discounts and returns.
r07_desc: Peak distribution by day and hour.
r08_desc: Invoices with high discounts or unusual states.
r09_desc: Compare sales summary between two time periods.
r10_desc: Items with no sales during the period with stock value.
r11_desc: Current stock with reorder limits and status.
r12_desc: Stock movement details with before/after quantities.
r13_desc: Current inventory valuation by WACC method.
r14_desc: Item list for physical counting with barcode and warehouse.
r20_desc: Comprehensive revenue, costs, expenses, and net profit.
r21_desc: Cash inflows and outflows with running balance.
r22_desc: Treasury and bank balances with transaction counts.
r24_desc: Customer invoices and payments with running balance.
r25_desc: Highest spending customers with contact and loyalty info.
r27_desc: Shift totals and expected cash variances.
r28_desc: Activity log with advanced filtering and details.
r29_desc: Gross and net sales after discounts and returns with profit.
r30_desc: Sales return details and inventory impact.
r31_desc: Discount analysis by range and payment method.
r32_desc: Profit margin analysis per item with selectable cost method.
r33_desc: Profit margin analysis per category with selectable cost method.
r34_desc: Purchase totals by date with supplier count.
r35_desc: Purchase order details with creator and item count.
r36_desc: Purchases grouped by supplier with returns.
r37_desc: Most purchased items with average cost.
r38_desc: Purchase return details with refund method.
r40_desc: Inventory age analysis by last movement date.
r41_desc: Items with no movement for extended periods.
r43_desc: Supplier purchase history with running balance.
r44_desc: Shift cash matching with expected vs actual.
r45_desc: Payment flow analysis by method with running total.
r46_desc: Balance distribution between banks and treasuries.
r47_desc: Shift settlement variances and accounting issues.
r48_desc: Sales VAT due with invoice count.
r49_desc: Recoverable purchase VAT with supplier count.
r50_desc: Comprehensive VAT period summary with net VAT.
invoice_note_placeholder: Add a note to the invoice…
features.banner: Disabling a feature does not delete its data — it only hides from the UI and returns fully when re-enabled.
features.gotoSettings: You can enable this feature from Settings → Features
feature_multi_unit.name: Multi-Unit (Carton / Dozen / Piece)
feature_variants.name: Variants (Sizes & Colors)
feature_serials.name: Serial / IMEI Tracking
feature_scale_barcodes.name: Scale Barcodes
feature_repair_orders.name: Repair & Service Work Orders
feature_restaurant.name: Restaurant Mode (Tables + Recipes)
feature_gold.name: Gold & Jewelry Pricing
updates.download_confirm_desc: A new system version will be downloaded and installed. Please read the warnings below before proceeding.
updates.download_step_save: Save all your open work — the system will restart after installation.
updates.download_step_close: Make sure to close any other windows (reports, open invoices).
updates.download_step_network: Ensure internet connectivity — additional data may need to be downloaded.
updates.download_step_restart: After installation, the system will restart automatically.
updates.download_confirm_checkbox: I confirm that I have saved my work and wish to proceed
updates.install_confirm_desc: The update will be installed and the system will restart immediately. This action cannot be undone.
updates.install_step_save: Ensure all pending transactions are saved (invoices, vouchers).
updates.install_step_close_app: The application will close completely and reopen.
updates.install_step_duration: Installation may take a few minutes — do not turn off your device.
updates.install_step_auto_launch: Once complete, the program will open automatically and everything will be up to date.
updates.install_confirm_checkbox: I confirm that I am ready to restart the system
updates.in_progress_desc: The update process is running. Please wait for it to complete — do not close the program or turn off your device.
serverDown.transient.title: Connection to the app lost
serverDown.transient.body: The internal server stopped responding. Retrying automatically — please don't close the app.
serverDown.restarting.title: Restarting the server...
serverDown.restarting.body: An error was detected and the internal server is restarting automatically. Please wait.
serverDown.offline.title: Network connection lost
serverDown.offline.body: The device appears to be offline. Check your connection and it will resume automatically.
serverDown.dbEperm.title: Can't access app files
serverDown.dbEperm.body: The app doesn't have permission to write to the data folder. Run the app as administrator, or move it out of the Program Files folder.
serverDown.dbLocked.title: Database is busy
serverDown.dbLocked.body: The database file is open by another copy of the app or another program. Close any other instance, then press Retry.
serverDown.dbCorrupt.title: Database is corrupted
serverDown.dbCorrupt.body: Couldn't open a healthy database. Use the Backup page to restore a healthy copy.
serverDown.portExhausted.title: Ports are busy
serverDown.portExhausted.body: All ports available to the app are in use by other programs. Close the conflicting programs, then press Retry.
serverDown.loopbackBlocked.title: Local connection blocked
serverDown.loopbackBlocked.body: Your antivirus or proxy settings seem to block the local connection (127.0.0.1). Add the app to your antivirus exceptions list.
serverDown.nativeModule.title: Internal component missing
serverDown.nativeModule.body: Couldn't load the database component. You may need to install the Microsoft Visual C++ Redistributable, or reinstall the app.
serverDown.fatal.title: Server failed to start
serverDown.fatal.body: The internal server couldn't start after several attempts. Try Diagnose & Fix below, or restart the app.
serverDown.persistentHint: If the problem persists, copy the report and send it to support.
serverDown.transientHint: If the problem persists, close and reopen the app.
rootError.title: An error occurred in the app
rootError.body: An unexpected error stopped the interface. Reload the app to continue — your data is safe.
treasury.ledger.title: Cash Flow Ledger
